summary: Bug fix iteration 55: All 3 requested fixes verified working. Films sorted by created_at descending, gender icons use pink/blue colors, infrastructure level-based screens correctly calculated (level 2 = 6 screens).

Same gender colors applied consistently in FilmDetail.jsx and CinemaJournal.jsx
Infrastructure add-film uses level-adjusted screens: base + (level-1)*2 (infrastructure.py line 493-495)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified. Level 2 cinema has 6 screens (4 base + 2 bonus). Gender icon colors correctly use text-pink-400 for female and text-blue-400 for male. Films API returns results sorted by created_at descending.

Gender icon colors in FilmWizard.jsx.details: Line 921: text-pink-400 for female (♀), text-blue-400 for male (♂)

Gender icon colors in FilmDetail.jsx.details: Lines 817, 829, 872: Same pink/blue pattern for director, screenwriter, actors

GET /api/infrastructure/{id} level-adjus.details: Level 2 cinema returns type_info.screens=6 and stats.screens=6 (4 base + 2 for level)
